assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Response provides specific commands to set maintenance windows for Saturday 2-6 AM UTC with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA recurrence pattern

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Commands explicitly use --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence with proper weekly Saturday schedule

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides specific commands for Q1-Q4 code freeze exclusions using --add-maintenance-exclusion-* flags with appropriate date ranges

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Includes specific command for SOX-audit-2024 exclusion covering November 1-30 with no_upgrades scope

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'no_upgrades can only be applied for 30 days maximum' when discussing the November audit exclusion

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows or clarify the difference between manual and auto-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response recommends Stable or Extended channels and provides specific commands to set release channels for different cluster types

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: All exclusion commands include --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods or potential compatibility issues
